fix-settings-persist-pr-2026-06-30.description: Fix: persist brightness/colour-temp/on-off; apply colour temp on all-monitors; cache JsonSerializerOptions

improve-tray-state-feedback-2026-06-30.description: Improve: tray tooltip shows (OFF) when light is off; all-monitors menu item text reflects active state

fix-settings-persist-perf-2026-06-29.description: Fix: persist brightness/colour-temp/on-off; apply colour temp on all-monitors; cache JsonSerializerOptions (superseded by 2026-06-30 branch)

fix-hotkey-feedback-2026-06-27.description: Fix: notify user when global hotkey registration fails

improve-color-temp-hotkeys-2026-06-27.description: Improve: add global hotkeys for colour temperature (Ctrl+Shift+Left/Right)

improve-glow-color-temp-2026-06-28.description: Improve: tint glow shadow to match colour temperature

perf-geometry-dedup-2026-06-28.description: Perf: skip redundant geometry allocation in ApplyHolePunchEffect + AppSettings unit tests

feature-start-with-windows-2026-06-28.description: Feat: add Start with Windows toggle in system tray menu (registry HKCU\...\Run)

maintainer_preferences: Prefers bug fixes and functional improvements. Closed refactoring PRs as not_planned. Does not want pure refactors without user-visible benefit.

known_limitations.pr_creation: GitHub Actions cannot create PRs in this repo - needs Settings > Actions > General > Allow GitHub Actions to create and approve pull requests
known_limitations.workflow_files: GitHub Actions cannot push .github/workflows/ files - needs 'workflows' permission.

notes: 2026-06-30 run (01:30 UTC): Tasks 3+5. Task 3: Rebased fix-settings-persist into new branch repo-assist/fix-settings-persist-pr-2026-06-30 (same content as 2026-06-29 branch). Task 5: Created improve-tray-state-feedback branch - tray tooltip shows (OFF) when light off; all-monitors menu item text reflects state. Both builds passed. PR creation likely still blocked by repo permission. Monthly summary #86 updated.
